proven.claim: Proven: "init" appears in help (line 540) AND is implemented as
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 540
; Proven: "init" appears in help (line 540) AND is implemented as
; case "init": await runInit(rest) in the switch — documentation matches implementation.
(declare-const init_documented Int)
(declare-const init_implemented Int)
; Line 540: "  init [project]  Scan codebase, install git hook" → documented = 1
(assert (= init_documented 1))
; switch(command) { case "init": await runInit(rest); } → implemented = 1
(assert (= init_implemented 1))
; NEGATE: documentation and implementation don't match
(assert (not (= init_documented init_implemented)))
(check-sat)
; Expected: unsat — init is both documented and implemented
